review_title: Meaningful Automation That Improves Release Confidence
description: Overall, our experience with QA Wolf has been very positive. They deliver high-quality, reliable test automation and operate with a strong partnership mindset. While early expectations around test creation speed needed alignment, the team was transparent, receptive to feedback, and ultimately delivered on their commitments. The biggest value comes from their ownership of test maintenance and investigation, which meaningfully reduces regression effort and improves release confidence. QA Wolf feels less like a vendor and more like an extension of our QA/QE team, and we’ve continued to expand the partnership as value became clear.
author: Trey W.
pros: High-quality, maintainable end-to-end tests that meaningfully replace manual regression—not shallow automation. Strong communication and a true partnership mindset; the team feels like an extension of our QA/QE organization. Clear ownership of test maintenance, flake investigation, and reporting, which keeps the signal reliable and actionable. Transparent delivery and realistic planning once expectations were aligned. Flexible commercial model that allows test coverage to evolve as product priorities change.
cons: Early expectations around test creation speed were set more aggressively during the sales cycle than what delivery could realistically support. ROI modeling required clarification and deeper alignment on assumptions to be truly meaningful for our operating model. Test velocity ramps up over time as domain knowledge is built, so value is strongest after the initial onboarding period rather than immediately.

review_title: QA Wolf - Premium automated regression testing - and a premium customer experience as well
description: QA Wolf was brought onboard to assist in automating a suite of then-manual tests run by our team of QA analysts. The goal was to increase test coverage and provide the ability for the company to deploy releases on a faster schedule while also reducing the amount of manual regression testing being handled by our in-house team. We were aiming for 80%+ test coverage. We had been using a competitive solution which utilized 'gig'-testers online to manually test in bulk, but we were unpleased with the results, flexibility and flakiness of the testing itself.
author: John H.
pros: QA Wolf was stellar from engagement through to initial delivery and ongoing service. Without much prompting or training from us, they not only matched our existing suite of tests, but also proposed a litany of additional tests, some we hadn't even anticipated or hadn't been able to cover in the past manually. Moreover, they were able to automate test processes that our previous vendor was not able to, broadening the impact of their service. We definitely feel like a premium partner, instead of just another customer - they take time to understand their clients and their needs and do what's needed to meet them. The commitment to the customer is paramount, and you definitely feel that in the engagement with all of the team members. And that's on top of a solid service and technology footing.
cons: Nothing - the lack of native Mac and mobile testing is apparently being addressed by the product team, so we're looking forward to that.

review_title: Reliable and Convenient Test Automation
description: My experience with QA Wolf has been positive. It's an easy-to-use platform, and the team is always very attentive and knowledgeable, which makes a significant difference.
author: Natia G.
pros: QA Wolf offers a user-friendly platform that simplifies test automation. Their deep case analysis results in stable tests, and their attentive team quickly addresses any failures. It's incredibly convenient that they handle both the execution and maintenance of all test cases.
cons: The only improvement I'd suggest is the addition of an instant reporting mechanism, and I know the team is already working on implementing this feature.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: QA Wolf #1 in My View
description: Professional and personable since Day 1. They have been unbelievably flexible when we have needed them to be and are extremely responsive to our requests.
author: Hannah D.
pros: Their ability to partner with us in meeting our needs and goals
cons: So far i havent found a 'least' liked thing. I have really appreciated the fact that adding QA Wolf team members is seamless.

review_title: Qa Wolf has helped increase confidence in our code
description: My overall experience with QA Wolf has been awesome. They are extremely helpful and have built a really cool product. They’ve helped us feel more confident when releasing new code and are always friendly and supportive whenever we need them.
author: Guerrero C.
pros: There are two things that I really enjoy the most about QA Wolf. First, the response time when tests fail. They’re really quick to respond and alert us when workflows are failing. Second is the ability for us to run automated tests not just in our static testing environments, but also in ephemeral environments. This is huge for my team because it means we can catch breaking changes earlier in the development process.
cons: I don’t really have anything that I dislike about QA Wolf. I would say that it would be nice if users could have the ability to mark a run as a test run or something similar, so that the QA Wolf team knows not to start alerting people when things fail. This is helpful if I’m deploying a branch to an environment to test my changes and might expect failures. It would help avoid unnecessary alerts and threads.

review_title: I would recommend QA Wolf to other professionals and companies.
description: QAW has helped make it easier for us to create and maintain an E2E automated test suite. We just need to do what we do best which is understand our customers and build the best product we can build to serve them. We explain to QAW what we're trying to do and that we are trying to do it with high quality and then they take us to the finish line with the E2E test.
author: Justin K.
pros: QA Wolf has helped with our automated test coverage. Bugs and regressions are bad however it's a great feeling to know you caught one before a customer ever experienced it. For example a QAW test that was working all of a sudden failed in our dev environment and we notified a dev to fix the issue they introduced before it is released to our customers. I like that we have daily tests that run and even hourly for the really sensitive things. We can add more tests to make sure we have enough coverage. Getting a coverage request started is easy and the team lets you know everything they need to take it to the finish line. The team is really engaged and will respond then loop in the relevant subject matter experts if needed.
cons: Not necessarily a negative but part of change at every company: We've had a great experience with the folks on our account but that can always change as people grow and move on. Sometimes you can tell when a newer QAW teammate has joined as they have to learn the product before they can properly identify bugs within it. On the opposite side, the folks who know our product really stand out in what they're able to catch and flag for us. We really hope they're around for the long haul because we're going to keep growing and need their help. I can't speak to the cost however I feel we are getting great value and our account manager is frequently meeting with us to push us to keep sending them tests to write for us.

review_title: A True Partner in Scalable Test Automation
description: Our overall experience has been outstanding. Over the past six months, QA Wolf has significantly strengthened our testing discipline and improved our release confidence. They’ve helped us move toward a more automated, reliable QA process without adding internal overhead. Their team is proactive, transparent, and focused on delivering measurable results. We’ve seen tangible improvements in coverage, defect detection, and deployment confidence. I would absolutely recommend them to any company looking to scale quality assurance in a structured and sustainable way.
author: Caleb C.
pros: What stood out most about QA Wolf was their ability to take full ownership of our test automation strategy and execute at a very high level. Their team is responsive, technically strong, and extremely process-driven. They don’t just write tests — they think through edge cases, failure scenarios, and long-term maintainability. The speed at which they built meaningful coverage and the consistency of their communication have been exceptional. It truly feels like an extension of our internal engineering team.
cons: There honestly hasn’t been much to dislike. As with any external partnership, there was an initial ramp-up period while they learned our product and workflows, but that process was structured and efficient. Once they were up to speed, the collaboration has been seamless.

review_title: We've cut our investment in building and maintaining automation by 80%
description: Outstanding experience. During our pilot of 3 months it became very clear the value it would add for us. From the first interaction to our current relationship, I would give a 5 out of 5.
author: Alberto S.
pros: As a CTO, I’ve always managed QA automation in-house. At HireVue, we had a large team dedicated to building and maintaining a Selenium framework for years. The reality was that our engineers spent an inordinate amount of time fixing flaky tests instead of driving innovation. The maintenance overhead was simply too high. This time in my career, I was determined to find a better way, which led me to QA Wolf. The difference has been night and day. The QA Wolf team got a comprehensive regression suite up and running for us during their 90-day pilot—a feat that would have taken my internal team over nine months to accomplish. The immediate impact was a game-changer, and the decision to move forward was easy. What stands out about QA Wolf is its turnkey service model. They handle all the test investigation and upkeep, freeing our engineering team from the constant burden of flaky tests and maintenance. Their test suites are also incredibly fast, giving us the quick feedback we need to deploy changes confidently and without delay. The onboarding process was seamless, and the QA Wolf team has proven to be an exceptional partner, always ready to help and share best practices. Their support truly feels like an extension of our own team—or as I like to say, "One Team, One Heart"—which makes all the difference. Thanks to QA Wolf, our regression testing is now solid and reliable, giving us significantly more confidence in every release. We've cut our investment in building and maintaining automation by 80% while increasing our test coverage to the levels we always aimed for. If you're looking to scale your QA automation without the associated headaches and overhead, I highly recommend QA Wolf.
cons: Nothing really to add here. We have been working with them for several months and all of our interactions have been positive.

review_title: QA Wolf From the Eyes of a .NET Developer
description: As a software developer with a preference for the frontend of things, I greatly appreciate QA Wolf's diligence in spotting new visual differences and pointing them out as potential issues, not yet opening a bug report until they have heard confirmation from one of us. We are in the midst of many large projects that greatly affect the trajectory of the company, so the speed at which they detect bugs in our current projects is an immense help.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The automation of our client-side test suite is what makes QA Wolf shine. They catch regressions before our users even have time to notice them! Their quick response times to all communication also stands out as a highly desired trait.
cons: Bug reports sometimes remain open due to irrelevant flows not passing. This isn't a very common occurrence, but it does happen from time to time.

review_title: QA Wolf Found 30+ Bugs in Our Software and Freed Our Employees from doing End-to-End Testing
author: Tim Z.
pros: QA Wolf found at least 30 hidden bugs within our insurance application management system that otherwise would have taken hundreds of hours to find. Plus, QA Wolf allowed our company to take the burden of testing off of our employees and allow them to do their actual job instead.
cons: A handful of flows created by QA Wolf were sometimes not functioning correctly, but the team promptly addressed concerns and fixed the flows very quickly.

review_title: Professional interactions, quality service and fast responses.
description: Great interactions and quality work with quick response times.
author: Will C.
pros: Simple and easy to use platform with expanding features often in response direct to feedback. Quick response times for requests and maintenance. A useful addition to our develope pipeline that provides greater confidence and peace of mind.
cons: For applications that are more complicated or frequently changing due to rapid demands and shifting expectations, a closely integrated and highly knowledgeable resourced is often necessary. But, QA Wolf excels at handling the more routine tasks that can otherwise become too costly over time.

review_title: QA Wolf is a Strategic Partner in Overall System Quality
description: QA Wolf has been a great strategic partner. I am excited to see our partnership grow.
author: Greg J.
pros: QA Wolf offers essential resources that enable our organization and stakeholders to allocate internal efforts toward more strategic functions. This shift results in improved efficiency and quality throughout our systems, team, and processes. The team implements tests quickly and integration between our teams is strong. Their functions also integrate with a number of our tools. This makes it easy for feedback to be shared, frequently and reliably.
cons: I have trouble sometimes when issues come up and I am working directly with their agents. Maybe it's a 2 way street, but our channel of communication could be clearer.

review_title: QA Wolf is the Testing partner you need!
description: QA Wolf has been a game-changer for our release process. Their team quickly grasped our business needs and built a comprehensive suite of tests, saving us countless hours of test writing. This, combined with their ability to easily incorporate accessibility and load testing into our pipeline, has dramatically boosted our confidence in the quality of our releases. Previously, these types of tests would have been a major undertaking, requiring significant investment in infrastructure and personnel. Now, with QA Wolf seamlessly integrated into our CI pipeline, we have a robust and reliable testing system that gives us peace of mind with every release.
author: Jordan S.
pros: They hit the ground running, understanding our business, our applications, and our team structure very quickly. They're quick to respond to questions or feedback and have been able to embed themselves in our teams very effectively.
cons: Not something we don't like, necessarily: We're just waiting for some additional reporting/analytics about test runs and trends over time
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best in automation and QA!
description: QA Wolf is a technological marvel. They help immensely with test automation and allow you to find issues before deploying anything to production. They are highly efficient, and as soon as they detect an error, they immediately communicate it through the proper channels so the problem can be resolved as quickly as possible. If your plan is to automate tests and prevent errors, QA Wolf is definitely your go-to option.
author: Diego Alejandro G.
pros: •Communication •Attention to detail •Automation •Priority support •Good work culture •Excellent technical level
cons: There isn’t much weekend support, but they have a team in Australia that provides out-of-office hours coverage for those of us in Western time zones.

review_title: Automated QA Experience with QA Wolf
description: My overall experience with QA Wolf has been excellent. Their team consistently handles coverage requests swiftly, and they are always available to make adjustments or answer any questions. The bug reporting process is streamlined and effective, enabling us to address any regressions quickly when rolling out new features.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: QA Wolf's ability to run comprehensive automated tests and accurately report bugs has significantly improved our product development process. Their system ensures no regressions occur with new releases, which saves me considerable time and allows me to focus on quality assurance for new features and bug fixes.
cons: I have yet to encounter any cons. Even when issues such as false positives arise or we have new requests, the team is quick to respond and resolve them efficiently.

review_title: QA Wolf is great!
description: Overall, it was fantastic. The customer support was great, the QA engineers were highly skilled, and they clearly knew what they were doing.
author: Henry Z.
pros: - QA Wolf employees are knowledgeable about both modern and traditional testing techniques, understanding how the latter have evolved into the former. - For example, they can differentiate between unit, integration, and end-to-end (e2e) tests. They are familiar with methodologies like "Arrange, Act, and Assert" or "Given, When, Then", and they have heard of the Testing Pyramid. - Their customer support is exceptional, always proactive and accommodating. They constantly seek feedback on how they can improve. - The QA engineers communicate through video recordings, which is both awesome and helpful. - These engineers make an effort to learn the product, which is crucial for understanding what is important to test and what is not. - They respond quickly when we request help with testing our most critical flow, such as approvals for a crypto app.
cons: - Our team hasn't had the bandwidth to analyze all the tests yet, but there may be some tests that are of less value. I'd like to focus more on covering the most critical parts rather than just increasing the coverage percentage. - QA Wolf requested that we add test-ids to the app. However, our team prefers not to include test-ids in our production build for various reasons. We consider this the lowest priority: [sensitive content hidden]. Despite this, QA Wolf was very accommodating and allowed us to skip these tests, as they weren't part of a crucial flow to begin with.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An absolute pleasure
description: QA Wolf has given us freedom from manual testing. Manual testing was incredibly time-consuming and a source of great anxiety for any new change given our extensive list of customizable options. These frustrations and now a thing of the distant past.
author: Teresa N.
pros: They are very particular about their hires. Each team member is personable, professional and hardworking. This combination isn't easy to find with tech professionals but now I know it's because QA Wolf poached them all.
cons: No cons to note but because this textbox has a 40 character minimum, I'll make time say they're exciting to work with.

review_title: A good service (and team!) that keeps getting better
description: I'm happy to be partnered with QA Wolf. They've really helped us to level up our quality efforts.
author: Tommy M.
pros: They're an extension of our team and collaborate well. They helped us rapidly improve our e2e coverage and provide a white glove service. Aside from their ability to deliver quality tests quickly I love that they manually verify test failures before filing a bug with us. That keeps the signal high and the noise low.
cons: Their pricing model makes it expensive to use their service in a CD pipeline. We use it to test a preview environment with tagged releases, but it would be even better if every commit to master were verified. In other words, I would like to shift a little further left.

review_title: A responsive team providing first class support
author: Matt F.
pros: The benefits of switching to QA Wolf have been outstanding. The QA Wolf team is very professional and responsive. When we request new coverage for a new feature, or modification of existing coverage, the requests are completed quickly and puts that coverage in place when we need it. When tests fail, we are alerted of a potential bug discovery within minutes, allowing us to address the issue before it reaches customers. The team proactively asks questions to understand our goals and removes barriers to help provide the test coverage we are looking for with our products.
cons: Our experiences with QA Wolf have all been positive coming up to our first year of this partnership. We don't have any cons to share at this time.

review_title: Seriously love QA Wolf
description: QA wolf has been great from the beginning. I have had the experience of having them work with projects that have several different products and they are always able to adapt. They are also extremely easy to work being very adaptable. Everyone is super friendly and helpful.
author: Mark S.
pros: ### QA Wolf ReviewQA Wolf has been incredibly supportive and adaptive in assisting my team with a project that has undergone numerous changes. Despite frequent shifts in requirements and scope, QA Wolf has consistently managed to update their test cases promptly to keep pace. When bugs are reported, they provide a video with detailed steps on how to recreate the issue, which is a significant time saver for my team. The combination of detailed information and visuals is immensely helpful. Moreover, they are excellent at following up on open bugs and offering thorough steps for resolution. Everyone I’ve interacted with at QA Wolf has been exceptionally friendly and professional.
cons: QA wolf's response time is so fast that it's hard to keep up. They have so many people standing by that if I message in-between meetings with I will have a quick response within a minute or two. Sometimes I am not prepared for that fast of a response. There is really nothing negative to say about QA wolf.

review_title: Great Service!
description: Great project, great people, it's been a successful project. We had numerous starts and stops to automated UI testing over the years that we were finally able to tackle with QA Wolf.
author: Eric M.
pros: They took care of everything. As a busy team we did not have to spend much time at all guiding them. The tests were very thorough and well thought out as well. Our tests run really fast!
cons: I don't really have any negatives to add.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Product, Great Support
description: Great team, friendly, easy to work with, very professional. And the testing software is easy to use when I want to manually trigger runs.
author: Johnny M.
pros: The best thing about QA Wolf is the way they manage the test suites, sort out the results, and submit bug reports in real time. This saves our team hours per week of what we would spend manually testing and triaging release candidates.
cons: Currently not able to run tests on dynamic preview URLs. But, I'm told this feature is coming soon and looking forward to it.

review_title: Automated Testing Gurus
author: Jon K.
pros: Test coverage helped us identify critical bugs before releasing to clients. Customer support is top-notch!
cons: Our software is complex, and creating automated test coverage requires some upfront work that can be difficult to provide since our team is understaffed.

review_title: QA Wolf Automation Excellence
description: Their customer service is excellent. I feel supported by a team and they explain their process, help drive initiatives and communicate regularly. The test runs are consistent with easy to review results. They are always willing to tune the automation so it is the best it can be for us.
author: Jacqueline P.
pros: Frees up our QA test time by running automated nightly regression tests, integrating with our tools and providing results in my company's communication channels.
cons: Any automation can be even faster. We have 150 tests that run for just under an hour. Of course, part of the time limitation is the tool under test and connection.

review_title: Excellent Collaboration and Adaptability
description: QAWolf have worked as collaborators with us on our test automation project. They were quick to understand the domaini and adapted quickly to our input on their first deliverables. They are also very flexible on the way we can provide requirements and feedback which makes it easy for us. They have provided value in the way that they have managed their role in the release test cycle.
author: Sunny G.
pros: They are very responsive to our needs both in communication and in deliverables. They spend time understanding our requirements and follow-up regulary on what's working and what needs improving. It's easy to communicate our requirements and updates with them as they are willing to take input in many modalities. They are quick to report issues that are found in testing and they collaborate actively in managing the bugs as well as test assets.
cons: That's hard to say as they adapt quickly to any of our inputs. Whenver we come across an area of imrpovement we can share with them in our regular catch-up's and it gets address.
